targets.denotes: the grounded substrate layer (grey rectangle at panel 1.15-3.00, y 2.46-2.62) in Panel E
targets.open_reason: 1.454 cm label; the clear span between E's left frame (panel-x 0, +0.10 clearance) and the substrate rectangle left edge (panel-x 1.15, -0.08 clearance) is only 0.97 cm < label width. Any rightward shift that clears the frame overlaps the filled substrate rect; below the apparatus box lies the trap-distribution plot (detachment + collision). No position/anchor-only move fits without a new collision or referent detachment.

targets.denotes: the grounded source-return / ground symbol in Panel F
targets.open_reason: the 'source return' line (0.994 cm) needs a 0.528 cm leftward shift to clear the right frame; that lands the text on the HV wiring / cantilever motif (empirically verified: new visual_clash text_on_path 'source' dark=0.162) and over its own ground-symbol referent at panel (3.98,3.41). No position/anchor-only move fits without a new collision or referent detachment.
